minimalParticipationDocumentation.label: Participation mode
minimalParticipationDocumentation.description: How the source describes participation or public involvement in the project.

minimalParticipationDocumentation.label: Participants
minimalParticipationDocumentation.description: Who takes part, such as communities, workers, publics, or institutional partners.

minimalParticipationDocumentation.label: Participation methods
minimalParticipationDocumentation.description: Concrete methods such as workshops, deliberation, data collection, annotation, or auditing.

minimalParticipationDocumentation.label: Participatory evidence
minimalParticipationDocumentation.description: Short, evidence-backed summary showing why the case belongs in the atlas.

recordFields.label: Project name
recordFields.description: Canonical project title used in the atlas.

recordFields.label: Provenance URL
recordFields.description: Stable public source used to verify the record.

recordFields.label: Official URL
recordFields.description: Primary project, program, or organization page when one exists.

recordFields.label: Country
recordFields.description: Country or global anchor used for atlas placement.

recordFields.label: City
recordFields.description: Optional city-level anchor when public materials make it clear.

recordFields.label: Lead organization
recordFields.description: Lead organization, lab, coalition, or steward named in the source materials.

recordFields.label: Category
recordFields.description: Primary atlas category for the project.

recordFields.label: Application domain
recordFields.description: Substantive domain such as healthcare, governance, accessibility, or humanitarian response.

recordFields.label: Atlas decision
recordFields.description: Current atlas placement such as Core, Cautious, or Review Candidate.

recordFields.label: Review status
recordFields.description: Current review state for the record, such as Ready or Manual Review Required.

recordFields.label: Evidence grade
recordFields.description: High-level quality signal for the available evidence.
